narrative:
Precinct Liberty East (precinct in Ross County) has 690 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.9 percentage points.
